prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约998名、1022名、984名、480名、432名，整体呈明显前移趋势（位次数字减小），近两年从984名快速跃升至432名，累计前移约552名，2025年基准约432名；该校在广东省物理类招生计划2021年82人、2022年135人、2023年127人、2024年97人、2025年93人，2026年计划仅30人，较2025年大幅缩招约68%，竞争压力显著加剧，位次数字应明显减小（更易进）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流，软科中国大学主榜连续6年稳居第4名（Top4），学校层次极高，对高分考生吸引力持续强劲；2026年高考周期声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及学术不端事件（撤稿量较多、竞赛奖金纠纷等），可能对部分考生报考心理产生一定抑制；抖音热度排名第42（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上，整体关注度尚可；拥有28个A-/A/A+学科，其中计算机科学与技术、机械工程、材料科学与工程、生物学、工商管理、管理科学与工程等均为A+，学科实力全国顶尖，对理工类考生吸引力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等热门工科专业持续高热推荐，与交大优势学科高度契合；广东省2026年物理类考生约45.6万人，较2025年增长约3.6%，考生基数扩大加剧竞争；上海交通大学位于上海市，属一线城市，地域吸引力强；该校在广东省招生占比相对稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年物理类招生计划大幅缩招（93→30人，-68%）这一最关键因素，但考虑广东省物理类考生增加约3.6%、学校声誉偏负面可能抑制部分报考热情、以及学校顶尖层次对高分考生的持续吸引力，在基准位次基础上适度上调修正；预测2026年物理类最低位次约306名，区间256–356名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Physics Category were approximately 998, 1022, 984, 480, and 432, showing a clear upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers). In the last two years, it rapidly rose from 984 to 432, a cumulative advance of about 552 places, with a 2025 baseline of about 432. The university's enrollment plan for the Physics Category in Guangdong was 82 in 2021, 135 in 2022, 127 in 2023, 97 in 2024, and 93 in 2025. The 2026 plan is only 30, a significant reduction of about 68% compared to 2025, sharply increasing competition pressure, so the ranking number should decrease significantly (easier to enter).

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class, ranked 4th (Top 4) in the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking for 6 consecutive years. The school level is extremely high, with strong and sustained appeal to high-scoring students. In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents (many retractions, competition prize disputes, etc.), which may suppress some students' application enthusiasm. Douyin popularity ranks 42nd (relatively hot), with medium-to-high short video exposure, overall attention is moderate. It has 28 A-/A/A+ disciplines, including Computer Science and Technology, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Biology, Business Administration, and Management Science and Engineering, all A+, with top-tier national disciplinary strength, strongly attracting science and engineering students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, closely aligned with SJTU's advantageous disciplines. In 2026, Guangdong's Physics Category examinees are about 456,000, an increase of about 3.6% from 2025, intensifying competition due to the larger candidate base. Shanghai Jiao Tong University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city, with strong regional appeal. The university's enrollment proportion in Guangdong remains relatively stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the most critical factor of a significant reduction in the 2026 Physics Category enrollment plan (93 to 30, -68%), but also taking into account the increase of about 3.6% in Guangdong Physics Category examinees, the negative reputation that may suppress some application enthusiasm, and the sustained appeal of the top-tier school to high-scoring students, the baseline ranking is moderately adjusted upward. The predicted 2026 minimum ranking for the Physics Category is about 306, with a range of 256–356.

Tier 3 majors (Biological Sciences, Materials, etc.) serve as safety choices. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (within 256), one can focus on aiming for Tier 1 top majors.
